## Cartographer v1.0.1

### Tests
- 109 pytest tests across geometry, OSM classification, stats, and data persistence
- Synthetic fixture system (round, course geometry, OSM feature factories)
- Test suite runs in CI with parent PinSheet repo as dependency

### Infrastructure
- CI workflow: checkout parent + plugin, install deps, compile, run tests, secrets check
- Release workflow: tag-triggered source zip + GitHub Release
- MIT LICENSE

### Documentation
- AGENTS.md with full architecture walkthrough and workflow guidance
- Session memory framework (HANDOFF, SESSION_LOG, DECISIONS, RUNBOOK)
- README badges (release, downloads, CI, platform, Python)
